_instructions: Single source of truth for outreach copy. Edit THIS when the product changes; the variant generator regenerates email arms from it (you never hand-edit templates). Fields marked FILL: need your real input. Everything else is drawn from what_is_clickcatalyst.txt — correct anything wrong.

product.name: ClickCatalyst
product.category: Google Ads observability, diagnostic & optimization platform
product.one_liner: Google Ads observability for agencies — automatically surfaces the waste, tracking issues, and optimization opportunities Google's own interface hides, packaged as client-ready white-label audit reports.

narrative.enemy: Google can't audit its own waste — and it's incentivized to grow spend, not protect your client's margin.
narrative.hook: Google says the account is healthy; the P&L says otherwise.
narrative.core_belief: Most Google Ads waste is invisible in the standard interface. ClickCatalyst surfaces it through structured diagnostics, quantifies it in dollars, and gives one-click fixes.

funnel.cold_email: Problem (invisible waste) -> offer a free audit of one client account
funnel.vehicle: White-label PDF audit report — the concrete, low-risk deliverable that earns trust
funnel.subscription: Pro / Business plans — ongoing observability, not one-off PDFs

icp.who: Small/medium US digital & advertising agencies running Google Ads for clients (~5-50 client accounts)
pains: Auditing client accounts is manual and eats senior PPC hours
Performance Max is a black box — almost no visibility into what it's doing or wasting
Hard to continuously prove ROI and justify retainers to clients
Onboarding a new client means a slow manual audit first
Wasted spend, tracking gaps, and bad conversion signals are invisible in Google's native UI

value_props.headline: Finds the invisible waste
value_props.detail: Structured diagnostics surface wasted spend, search-term bleed, tracking mismatches, and bad conversion signals that don't show in Google's UI

value_props.headline: Quantified in dollars
value_props.detail: Every issue is sized in $ ('this is burning $X/mo'), not abstract scores

value_props.headline: White-label, client-ready
value_props.detail: 18+ branded PDF report types, 'Prepared for [Client] — Powered by clickcatalyst.digital', generated in minutes instead of hours

value_props.headline: PMax & AI Max observability
value_props.detail: Opens the least transparent campaign types Google ships — asset groups, signal health, attribution drift, algorithm readiness

value_props.headline: Diagnostic-first, one-click fixes
value_props.detail: Tells you what's wrong, why, and gives embedded actions to fix it — not just reporting

_proof_status: pre-launch — no fabricated proof in copy; lean on the concrete free audit + the problem narrative. Founding Agency scarcity is saved for the reply, not the cold email.
differentiators: Diagnostic-first, not a reporting or automation tool
Quantifies waste in dollars, not vanity scores
PMax / AI Max observability that native reporting intentionally hides

cta_options.text: Reply and I'll send a promo code for a free audit (one of 13) on a real client account
Offer to send a sample PDF report so they see the output first
Ask how they currently audit client accounts at scale
Link to the free-audit page / live demo

offer.free_entry: Free audit (promo code) at https://clickcatalyst.digital/free-audit — 13 audit types available

saas.pro: $103/mo annual ($208 monthly) — up to 10 connections, 3 branded PDFs/mo. Target: small agencies (5-10 clients)
saas.business: $208/mo annual ($416 monthly) — up to 50 connections, unlimited white-label PDFs. Target: scaling agencies (10-50+ clients)

offer.founding_agency_program: 50% off year one (locked at signup), then 25% off ongoing. First 100 agencies only. SAVED FOR THE REPLY, not the cold email.
offer.cold_email_offer: Free Efficiency & Waste audit on ONE of their client accounts, delivered via a promo code sent when they reply. No link in the cold email — the CTA is a reply.

tone.style: problem-first, conversational, understated, peer-to-peer (founder to agency owner)
avoid: category language (observability/diagnostic) in the cold open

personalization_signals._note: Per-lead data captured at enrich — the generator builds ONE observed sentence so each email feels researched, not mass-sent.

compliance.postal_address: FILL: full real company address (street/area, Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India) — CAN-SPAM requires it
